	Guzhang, Wuwei Precinct (Presently Wuwei in Gansu Province)

	 Other Names

	 Name Notes 
	Jia Xu is pronounced Jia2 Xu3 because of the 3rd tone preceeding the second in his normal given name. His name and style name should be pronounced and said as “Jia3 Wen2 He2”, not “Jia2 Wen2 He2”. He appears in some old Koei games as Jia Xue.

full_text:
Jia Xu (Wenhe) 賈詡 (文和)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jia Xu (賈詡), styledWenhe (文和), was born in Guzhang, Wuwei Precinct (Presently Wuwei in Gansu Province). Skillful advisor who served many lords. His cunning and quick nature helped them many times. Jia Xu was affiliated with Dong Zhuo, Guo Si, Li Jue, Duan Wei, Zhang Xiu, and the Wei Kingdom. Jia Xu lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
